snippets.description: CreateNfsShare create an NFS share.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution CreateNfsShare Sample

snippets.description: CreateProvisioningConfig create new ProvisioningConfig.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution CreateProvisioningConfig Sample

snippets.description:
CreateSSHKey register a public SSH key in the specified project for use with the
interactive serial console feature.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution CreateSSHKey Sample

snippets.description:
CreateVolumeSnapshot takes a snapshot of a boot volume.
Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution CreateVolumeSnapshot Sample

snippets.description: DeleteNfsShare delete an NFS share. The underlying volume is automatically deleted.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution DeleteNfsShare Sample

snippets.description: DeleteSSHKey deletes a public SSH key registered in the specified project.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution DeleteSSHKey Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteVolumeSnapshot deletes a volume snapshot.
Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution DeleteVolumeSnapshot Sample

snippets.description: DetachLun detach LUN from Instance.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution DetachLun Sample

snippets.description: DisableInteractiveSerialConsole disable the interactive serial console feature on an instance.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution DisableInteractiveSerialConsole Sample

snippets.description: EnableInteractiveSerialConsole enable the interactive serial console feature on an instance.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution EnableInteractiveSerialConsole Sample

snippets.description:
EvictLun skips lun's cooloff and deletes it now.
Lun must be in cooloff state.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution EvictLun Sample

snippets.description:
EvictVolume skips volume's cooloff and deletes it now.
Volume must be in cooloff state.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution EvictVolume Sample

snippets.description: GetInstance get details about a single server.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetInstance Sample

snippets.description: GetLocation gets information about a location.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetLocation Sample

snippets.description: GetLun get details of a single storage logical unit number(LUN).
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetLun Sample

snippets.description: GetNetwork get details of a single network.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetNetwork Sample

snippets.description: GetNfsShare get details of a single NFS share.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetNfsShare Sample

snippets.description: GetProvisioningConfig get ProvisioningConfig by name.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetProvisioningConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetVolume get details of a single storage volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetVolume Sample

snippets.description:
GetVolumeSnapshot returns the specified snapshot resource.
Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution GetVolumeSnapshot Sample

snippets.description: ListInstances list servers in a given project and location.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListInstances Sample

snippets.description: ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListLocations Sample

snippets.description: ListLuns list storage volume luns for given storage volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListLuns Sample

snippets.description:
ListNetworkUsage list all Networks (and used IPs for each Network) in the vendor account
associated with the specified project.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListNetworkUsage Sample

snippets.description: ListNetworks list network in a given project and location.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListNetworks Sample

snippets.description: ListNfsShares list NFS shares.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListNfsShares Sample

snippets.description: ListOSImages retrieves the list of OS images which are currently approved.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListOSImages Sample

snippets.description: ListProvisioningQuotas list the budget details to provision resources on a given project.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListProvisioningQuotas Sample

snippets.description:
ListSSHKeys lists the public SSH keys registered for the specified project.
These SSH keys are used only for the interactive serial console feature.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListSSHKeys Sample

snippets.description:
ListVolumeSnapshots retrieves the list of snapshots for the specified volume.
Returns a response with an empty list of snapshots if called
for a non-boot volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListVolumeSnapshots Sample

snippets.description: ListVolumes list storage volumes in a given project and location.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ListVolumes Sample

snippets.description:
RenameInstance renameInstance sets a new name for an instance.
Use with caution, previous names become immediately invalidated.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution RenameInstance Sample

snippets.description:
RenameNetwork renameNetwork sets a new name for a network.
Use with caution, previous names become immediately invalidated.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution RenameNetwork Sample

snippets.description:
RenameNfsShare renameNfsShare sets a new name for an nfsshare.
Use with caution, previous names become immediately invalidated.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution RenameNfsShare Sample

snippets.description:
RenameVolume renameVolume sets a new name for a volume.
Use with caution, previous names become immediately invalidated.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution RenameVolume Sample

snippets.description:
ResetInstance perform an ungraceful, hard reset on a server. Equivalent to shutting the
power off and then turning it back on.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ResetInstance Sample

snippets.description: ResizeVolume emergency Volume resize.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution ResizeVolume Sample

snippets.description:
RestoreVolumeSnapshot uses the specified snapshot to restore its parent volume.
Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution RestoreVolumeSnapshot Sample

snippets.description: StartInstance starts a server that was shutdown.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution StartInstance Sample

snippets.description: StopInstance stop a running server.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution StopInstance Sample

snippets.description: SubmitProvisioningConfig submit a provisiong configuration for a given project.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution SubmitProvisioningConfig Sample

snippets.description: UpdateInstance update details of a single server.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution UpdateInstance Sample

snippets.description: UpdateNetwork update details of a single network.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution UpdateNetwork Sample

snippets.description: UpdateNfsShare update details of a single NFS share.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution UpdateNfsShare Sample

snippets.description: UpdateProvisioningConfig update existing ProvisioningConfig.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution UpdateProvisioningConfig Sample

snippets.description: UpdateVolume update details of a single storage volume.
snippets.title: baremetalsolution UpdateVolume Sample
